title: Storage Adapter Interface Design
purpose: Design the storage adapter abstraction layer that will eventually support filesystem, SQLite, and Postgres backends. All runtime state mutations must pass through adapters.
architectural_constraints: Interface must support event_store, checkpoint_store, state_store, lock_store, audit_store
No direct filesystem mutation from runtime scripts
acceptance_criteria: No runtime script directly mutates files
Migration path documented for future SQLite/Postgres adapters

traceability.description: Designed storage adapter interface with filesystem implementation and factory
